title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 162.501 - Secretary to issue certificates of election
text:
162.501.  Secretary to issue certificates of election. — The secretary of the board of directors shall lay the results before the board and record the same, and under the direction of the board shall issue certificates of election to the parties entitled thereto.
(L. 1963 p. 200 § 3-50, A.L. 1978 H.B. 971) 
(Source: RSMo 1959 § 165.467)
